_comment: Architecture rules for the LeakyOracle app — an MVVM layering profile (the default arch/rules.json is STS-specific: Sts.* / SQL / WPF). Shows the rules engine is configurable per codebase, not STS-hardcoded. Allowed direction: Views -> ViewModels -> Services; the reverse is forbidden. Cycle/god-class/coupling thresholds mirror the defaults.

layers.message: view-model depends on a view (MVVM inversion — the view should depend on the VM, not the reverse)
service layer depends on the UI (views/view-models) — services must not know about the presentation
